api_key.description: Appfigures Personal Access Token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Appfigures API base URL override for tests or proxies.

search_store.description: Optional store filter (e.g. apple, google_play) sent as the store query parameter.

group_by.description: Optional group_by query parameter passed through to Appfigures list endpoints.

start_date.description: Optional start query parameter (Appfigures date filter lower bound).

end_date.description: Optional end query parameter (Appfigures date filter upper bound).
